steps.name: Verify the login page is open

Verify the projects page is open
Verify the projects page is open
Verify the project creation form is open
$("[data-testid='addEditProjectAnnouncement'] .fr-element[contenteditable='true']") send keys(Repudiandae quas occaecati numquam illum.)
